name: conduit-browser
description: Linked multi-pane Electron browser with explicit pane-one control, isolated routes, optional request filtering, live toolbar settings, and a compact liquid-glass interface.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-v12.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/page-preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v11.js && node --check src/renderer/ui-v14.js && npm test
